description: Strikes target hospitals, schools, and cultural sites across Iran, disrupting daily life particularly in Tehran.

title: Why Torpedoed Iranian Warship Is a Problem for India
description: An Iranian ship had been invited by India to take part in peacetime naval exercises with dozens of other countries, days before it was sunk in a U.S. submarine attack.

title: Israelis back war with Iran despite uncertainty and fatigue
description: Israelis broadly support the US-Israeli military campaign with Iran, even if they are tired of air raid alerts and constant upheaval.

title: Israel Pushes Farther Into Lebanon, and Readies for More
description: Days into its offensive against Hezbollah, Israel is massing armored vehicles near the Lebanese border for a potentially much larger ground incursion.

title: Live Updates: Trump Says He Should Have Role in Picking Iran’s Leader
description: Israel threatened more strikes in Lebanon as the Middle East crisis spilled beyond Iran. Italy pledged air defense weapons to help Gulf nations defend against attacks, and Iranian drones landed in Azerbaijan.

title: Iran’s strikes on Arab states open door to new Gulf approach toward Israel
description:
As Israel reportedly aids defense of US allies in region, pathways to new alliances could emerge. But shared threat of Iran hasn't pushed Gulf states into Israel's arms yet
The post Iran’s strikes on Arab states open door to new Gulf approach toward Israel appeared first on The Times of Israel.
